title: sorbus aria f. cyclophylla
intro: Sorbus aria f. cyclophylla, also known as the Whitebeam or Mountain Ash, is a deciduous shrub or small tree belonging to the Rosaceae family, characterized by its white or pink flowers and red berries. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent qualities. The health benefits of Sorbus aria f. cyclophylla include its potential to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and ulcers, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Sorbus aria f. cyclophylla include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments and promote overall well-being.
